verification_gate: Acceptance proves bounded autonomy, explicit authority, capability gain, failure learning, reversible promotion, auditability, human stop, and recovery while preserving the North Star.

clause_bounded_autonomy.mechanism: Runtime rule pipeline (identity -> policy -> memory -> simulation -> execution -> proof -> rollback); one bounded execution_packets/<TASK_ID>.json per action (§18 three-surface rule); typed cell (doc/sim/dev/proof/policy/release) with network denied by default, read-only FS except writable_paths, no mutation without snapshot.
clause_bounded_autonomy.evidence: Scope is supplied by the authority graph + packet, never minted by the agent; proof cites the packet id and cell type.
clause_bounded_autonomy.tiered_relationship: PostgreSQL owns the scoping authority macro-state; redb is a transient in-cell scratchpad, never a scope authority; AgentDB non-authoritative for shared scope.

clause_explicit_authority.owner: Governance Board / NOA(CECCA); David final human authority
clause_explicit_authority.mechanism: Authority graph David -> Constitution -> Board -> NOA/CECCA -> Executives -> Departments -> Workers -> Tools; delegates_to/escalates_to/verifies/constrains edges per object; CEO agent may propose/delegate but NOT execute raw shell (Constitution §6); §11 automatic Needs-Human-Approval for spend/legal/external/production-mutation/account-creation/credential-handling/trading/physical-home-automation/irreversible.
clause_explicit_authority.evidence: Authority-graph edges resolve; §11 gate classification present; no raw-shell path for the CEO agent.
clause_explicit_authority.tiered_relationship: PostgreSQL owns durable authority/permission/provenance rows; raw secrets stay in the keyring (STORE-001), never redb or PostgreSQL raw.

clause_capability_gain.mechanism: Doctrine law 3 (every completed or failed action improves future execution); each action emits a proof record (success) or Failure Capsule (failure); no capability leaves redb-durable except via the STORE-001 verified BlobStore SHA-256 parity cutover under one preserved identity; upgrades-not-downgrades enforced by the migration mechanism, not by freezing redb.
clause_capability_gain.evidence: STORE-001 invariant 'provenance / SHA-256 identity preserved'; adopted_capabilities.source.csv maps each capability exactly once, no second-implementation row (ADOPT-001).
clause_capability_gain.tiered_relationship: PostgreSQL canonical durable owner preserves migrated capability under one SHA-256 identity; AgentDB SONA turns failures into improved policy; redb transient loss is capability-neutral.

clause_failure_learning.mechanism: Failure-learning chain Raw Event -> Failure Capsule -> Causal Map -> Scoped Lesson -> Guardrail -> Instinct (Master Plan §1.5); LIVING-002 gate (source evidence, causal scope, simulation, regression tests, human authority where required, reversible promotion, monitoring, automatic rollback on failed proof); every lesson bound to a SHAKE256 witness chain rooted in a verified PostgreSQL source vector; Causal Graph Verification (GNN) rejects rootless claims; SONA adjusts only from observed successes/failures.
clause_failure_learning.evidence: Witness-chain root exists; causal edge present; ATAS failure nodes grounded in observed past failure rates; a failed world is learned-from but never promoted.
clause_failure_learning.blocks: FBD-2 hidden mutation and FBD-1 self-authorized expansion
clause_failure_learning.tiered_relationship: AgentDB owns the per-agent lesson (non-authoritative); PostgreSQL owns the witnessed root and any promoted guardrail; redb buffers transient failure traces only.

clause_reversible_promotion.mechanism: Cell ladder simulation -> dev-cell -> proof-cell -> release-cell; COW branching; merge to PostgreSQL trunk ONLY after the explicit gate stack (MinCut not-severed, Causal Graph Verification, SHAKE256 witness chain, ATAS/ESN stability, RuvLTRA escalation, LifeOS human-in-the-loop); no production mutation without snapshot (Constitution §6); failed branch deterministically rolled back and discarded; baseline restorable by PostgreSQL PITR + COW rollback.
clause_reversible_promotion.evidence: Promotion ladder + gate stack recorded; snapshot precedes mutation; rollback path present; no autonomous promotion.
clause_reversible_promotion.blocks: FBD-3 capability loss and FBD-2 hidden mutation
clause_reversible_promotion.tiered_relationship: PostgreSQL COW trunk is the promotion target and baseline authority; redb subordinate forward-only WAL, never a second baseline; redb-durable -> PostgreSQL reclassification gated by STORE-001 verified SHA-256 cutover.

clause_auditability.mechanism: Doctrine law 1 (no invisible mutation) + law 4 (proof is completion) + Constitution §6 (no hidden mutation, no completion without proof); every action writes proof_records/<TASK_ID>.proof.json appended to proof_ledger.jsonl (§18 loop); three-surface rule (CSV human / JSON packet agent / proof JSON reality); every durable edit bound to a SHAKE256 witness chain and passing Causal Graph Verification.
clause_auditability.evidence: Append-only proof ledger; witness-chain coverage for durable edits; three-surface separation intact; no paper execution.
clause_auditability.tiered_relationship: PostgreSQL is the canonical PITR-recoverable audit substrate (witness roots, causal edges, provenance); redb -> envctl -> PostgreSQL sync is forward-only and auditable at flush, no undirected dual-write.

clause_human_stop.owner: David (final human authority) / Board (ccboard veto) / Runtime Kernel (RuVector MinCut)
clause_human_stop.mechanism: Constitution §6 (David final authority; CEO may not execute raw shell) + §11 automatic Needs-Human-Approval (fail-closed when approval absent); Board/ccboard veto surface can refuse/halt before promotion; RuVector MinCut deterministically severs a drifting agent in subpolynomial O(n^{o(1)}) time without restarting the swarm.
clause_human_stop.evidence: §11 stop points enumerated per action class; veto surface present; MinCut isolation path defined; approval fails closed.
clause_human_stop.blocks: FBD-1 self-authorized expansion and FBD-2 hidden mutation
clause_human_stop.tiered_relationship: PostgreSQL holds the durable approval/veto decision state and the dependency graph MinCut monitors; redb/AgentDB cannot override a recorded human stop.

clause_recovery.mechanism: Reversibility (doctrine law 2) + no production mutation without snapshot (Constitution §6) + STORE-001 recovery sources: PostgreSQL PITR for durable+semantic macro-state (with reproducible re-embedding), deterministic COW rollback of un-merged branches, redb subordinate application-level WAL forward-replay-with-ack on reconnect, deterministic re-projection of derived musl source trees, AgentDB .rvf regeneration from base model + witnessed history, keyring for secrets.
clause_recovery.evidence: Each STORE-001 state class has a named recovery source; every task carries a rollback_plan; redb never becomes a durable authority.
clause_recovery.tiered_relationship: Mirrors the STORE-001 recovery_source column exactly across PostgreSQL / redb / AgentDB / derived projections / keyring.

clause_preserving_the_north_star.mechanism: Binds Master Plan §1 North Star verbatim ('LifeOS is the ... operating environment. It is not the CEO. ... environment, runtime spine, memory substrate, policy layer, and execution surface'; anchor the North Star, think small, act small) and 00_NORTH_STAR.md v0 (hard execution boundaries over soft autonomy; constraint propagation over improvisation; proof before completion; recommendation from verified state; refusal to become a broad agent platform / simulation playground / full-autonomy stack); acceptance fails CLOSED (RELEASE-001 doctrine) unless every DIM-1..DIM-8 holds and the sum equals the North Star.
clause_preserving_the_north_star.evidence: Canonical path intent -> authority graph -> task graph -> DevWorld simulation -> hermetic cell -> proof ledger -> next-action recommendation preserved end to end; v0 refusal list honored; acceptance fail-closed.
clause_preserving_the_north_star.blocks: FBD-1, FBD-2, and FBD-3 in aggregate
clause_preserving_the_north_star.tiered_relationship: Preserves the STORE-001 authority model as the substrate (PostgreSQL canonical, redb transient, AgentDB non-authoritative, verified cutover only).

inputs_consumed.LIVING-002: failure-learning + proven-world promotion feed DIM-4 + DIM-5
inputs_consumed.RELEASE-001: North Star acceptance + fail-closed doctrine feed DIM-9
inputs_consumed.runtime_rule: Master Plan §1 (no unlimited authority) feeds DIM-1 + DIM-2

blocked_paths_respected.irreversible_action: none — every dimension is reversible/recoverable by construction
blocked_paths_respected.authority_change: none — the authority graph is referenced, not modified
blocked_paths_respected.secret_access: none — secrets referenced by class only, never read/written

proof_summary: LIVING-003 defines the upgrade-only autonomous-operation acceptance family, decomposing the eight gate acceptance dimensions plus North Star preservation into nine work items (LIVING-003-A..I) and assigning each exactly once an owner, proof mechanism, observed-evidence source, and tiered-architecture relationship under the settled STORE-001 model. It first enumerates the real X set the gate governs: the six autonomous operation capabilities (recommend, plan, simulate, execute-within-authority, learn, improve-continuously) and the three forbidden expansions (self-authorized expansion, hidden mutation, capability loss). Bounded autonomy (A) binds the Master Plan §1 runtime rule so every action passes the identity->policy->memory->simulation->execution->proof->rollback pipeline inside one bounded packet and a network-denied typed cell, with scope minted by the authority graph, not the agent. Explicit authority (B) binds the authority graph David->Constitution->Board->NOA/CECCA->Executives->Departments->Workers->Tools, keeps the CEO agent from executing raw shell, and forces §11 Needs-Human-Approval for spend/legal/external/production/irreversible actions. Capability gain (C) binds doctrine law 3 and the STORE-001 verified BlobStore SHA-256 cutover so every completed or failed action improves future execution and no capability is silently lost. Failure learning (D) binds the Raw Event->Failure Capsule->Causal Map->Scoped Lesson->Guardrail->Instinct chain and LIVING-002, keeping every lesson proof-derived via SHAKE256 witness chains rooted in verified PostgreSQL vectors and Causal Graph Verification. Reversible promotion (E) binds the simulation->dev-cell->proof-cell->release-cell ladder and gated COW merge so nothing reaches the PostgreSQL trunk without the full gate stack and every promotion is reversible by PITR + COW rollback. Auditability (F) binds Integrity, no-paper-execution, the append-only proof ledger, the three-surface rule, and witness chains so nothing mutates invisibly. Human stop (G) binds Constitution §6 (David final authority; no raw shell for the CEO), §11 fail-closed approval, the Board/ccboard veto, and RuVector MinCut subpolynomial isolation. Recovery (H) mirrors the STORE-001 recovery_source column exactly (PostgreSQL PITR, COW rollback, redb forward-only WAL replay, re-projection, .rvf regeneration, keyring). North Star preservation (I) binds both North Star statements and the RELEASE-001 fail-closed doctrine, keeping the canonical intent->authority->task->simulation->cell->proof->recommendation path and refusing drift into a broad-autonomy platform. Every acceptance dimension is assigned exactly once, every operation capability is bounded, and every forbidden expansion is blocked; each assignment traces to the Master Plan, the North Star doc, the Architecture Blueprint, the Context Matrix, or STORE-001. This is acceptance definition only in the proof-cell — no autonomous operation is enabled and no product execution, authority change, release, secret access, or baseline mutation was performed.

rollback_plan: Restore the archived living-system acceptance plan; no autonomous operation is enabled and no config, secret, model, authority, or baseline is changed.
